title: ocotea costulata
intro: Ocotea costulata, also known as Costa Rican sassafras, is a plant species belonging to the Lauraceae family, native to the tropical forests of Central America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, such as limonene and beta-caryophyllene. The health benefits of Ocotea costulata include relieving anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Ocotea costulata include essential oils and extracts that can be used topically or ingested, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
